full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #62 (2026-06-14)

PULSE
Health: 0.6729 (B). 1051 wallets, 310 contributors. 365 memos today vs 135 avg. Velocity rising.

FLOW
274 reward payments, 594907 PFT distributed to 32 contributors. Top earner: rKTbxK...got3 (212044 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (10,500 PFT, avg 3,500/day over 3 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rKTbxK...got3 (187 memos). Fastest new contributor: rkuZuJ...KYnF (12.3 memos/day in 3 days). 15 new wallet(s) this week. 69 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-15): 131 transactions from 24 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
